debug_info.goal:
Ident : Type u_1
ε : @Graphiti.FinEnv Ident (String × String)
a : List String
⊢ ∃ b,
    a.length = b.length ∧
      (∀ (a' b' : String), (a', b') ∈ a.zip b → ¬Batteries.AssocList.contains (a', b') ε = true) ∧ (a.zip b).Nodup

failed_attempts:
have string_mk_data : ∀ l : List Char, (String.mk l).data = l := by
      intro l; simp [String.data, String.mk, String.Internal.toArray]
    have foldl_max_ge_init : ∀ (l : List String) (init : Nat),
        init ≤ l.foldl (fun acc s => max acc s.data.length) init := by
      intro l; induction l with
      | nil => intro init; simp [List.foldl]
      | cons hd tl ih => intro init; simp [List.foldl]; exact Nat.le_trans (by omega) (ih _)
    have foldl_max_ge_of_mem : ∀ (l : List String) (s : String) (init : Nat), s ∈ l →
        s.data.length ≤ l.foldl (fun acc s => max acc s.data.length) init := by
      intro l; induction l with
      | nil => intro s init h; simp at h
      | cons hd tl ih =>
        intro s init h; simp [List.foldl]
        cases List.mem_cons.mp h with
        | inl heq => subst heq; exact Nat.le_trans (by omega) (foldl_max_ge_init _ _)
        | inr h => exact ih _ _ h
    have contains_mem_keysList : ∀ (a : String × String) (l : Batteries.AssocList (String × String) (TModule1 Ident)),
        l.contains a = true → a ∈ l.keysList := by
      intro a l h
      simp [Batteries.AssocList.keysList, Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq] at *
      exact h
    induction a with
    | nil => exact ⟨[], rfl, fun _ _ h => by simp at h, List.nodup_nil⟩
    | cons hd tl ih =>
      obtain ⟨btl, hlen, hfresh_ih, hnodup⟩ := ih
      let badStrings : List String :=
        (ε.keysList.map Prod.snd) ++ (tl.zip btl |>.map Prod.snd)
      let maxL := badStrings.foldl (fun acc s => max acc s.data.length) 0
      let fresh := String.mk (List.replicate (maxL + 1) 'a')
      have hfresh_not_bad : fresh ∉ badStrings := by
        intro hmem
        have h1 := foldl_max_ge_of_mem badStrings fresh 0 hmem
        have h2 : fresh.data.length = maxL + 1 := by
          simp [fresh, string_mk_data]
        omega
      refine ⟨fresh :: btl, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp [hlen]
      · intro a' b' hmem hcontains
        simp [List.zip_cons_cons] at hmem
        cases hmem with
        | inl heq =>
          have ha' := heq.1
          have hb' := heq.2
          subst ha'; subst hb'
          have hkey := contains_mem_keysList _ _ hcontains
          have hmem_snd : fresh ∈ ε.keysList.map Prod.snd := by
            exact List.mem_map.mpr ⟨_, hkey, rfl⟩
          have : fresh ∈ badStrings := List.mem_append.mpr (Or.inl hmem_snd)
          exact absurd this hfresh_not_bad
        | inr hmem => exact hfresh_ih a' b' hmem hcontains
      · rw [List.zip_cons_cons, List.nodup_cons]
        constructor
        · intro hmem
          have hmem_snd : fresh ∈ (tl.zip btl).map Prod.snd := by
            exact List.mem_map.mpr ⟨_, hmem, rfl⟩
          have : fresh ∈ badStrings := List.mem_append.mpr (Or.inr hmem_snd)
          exact absurd this hfresh_not_bad
        · exact hnodup
